transcript: Hey guys.  This is our dulce de leche with zero added sugar.  It's a product where we receive the milk, heat it, and process it until it reaches this point.  When we get to this point, we go straight to the labeling area, where the labels are placed, and up here we put the expiration date, the manufacturing date, and the batch number.  So folks, if you want this candy straight from the factory to your home, just click the link below. [music]
